messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0089",
  "title": "数据描述",
  "page_index": 27,
  "page_range": "27"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0090",
    "title": "市场收入规模（柱状图）",
    "page_range": "27",
    "summary": "This section presents annual market revenue scale data (in 亿元/billion RMB) from 2021 to 2025, visualized as a bar chart. It enables retrieval for:\n- **Topics & Metrics:** Annual market revenue size.\n- **Dates & Entities:** Yearly data points for 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, and 2025.\n- **Specific Values:** 2021: 36.48B; 2022: 35.08B; 2023: 34.72B; 2024: 36.10B; 2025: 36.46B.\n- **Claims/Trends:** Revenue declined from 2021 to a trough in 2023, followed by a recovery in 2024 and 2025.\n- **Figures & Evidence Type:** Quantitative market data presented in a bar chart.\n- **Answerable Questions:** What was the exact market revenue for a specific year (2021–2025)? How did revenue fluctuate year-over-year? What are the projected/recovered market size figures for 2024–2025? What is the overall five-year revenue trend?"
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0091",
    "title": "增长率（折线图）",
    "page_range": "27",
    "summary": "This section answers questions regarding annual growth rate metrics across consecutive year-over-year periods from 2021 to 2025. It provides specific quantitative values (-3.82% for 2021–2022, -1.05% for 2022–2023, 3.98% for 2023–2024, and 0.99% for 2024–2025) that correspond to a line chart figure. The content serves as direct numerical evidence for trend analysis, temporal comparison queries, and chart-based data retrieval. No definitions, procedures, or additional entities are specified."
  }
]

message.content: This section ("数据描述" / Data Description) on page 27 provides a quantitative overview of market performance from 2021 to 2025, structured around two key visualizations. It covers topics of annual market revenue scale and year-over-year growth rates. Dates span 2021–2025. Figures include a bar chart for revenue and a line chart for growth rates. Metrics detail revenue in billion RMB (36.48B in 2021, 35.08B in 2022, 34.72B in 2023, 36.10B in 2024, 36.46B in 2025) and YoY growth percentages (-3.82% for 2021–2022, -1.05% for 2022–2023, 3.98% for 2023–2024, 0.99% for 2024–2025). Claims indicate a revenue decline through 2023 followed by a recovery in 2024–2025. The evidence type consists of direct quantitative numerical data and chart-based visualizations for trend analysis and temporal comparison. No tables, definitions, procedures, or specific industry entities are specified.
